data.title: 'He Taught Me A Word I Never Heard,' Says Shaquille O'Neal About The Time He Received The Greatest Investment Advice From A Rich 80-Year-Old
Tentative Deal Announced To End Boeing Strike, Union Will Vote Wednesday
data.description: A preliminary agreement was reached to resolve the five-week strike at Boeing, the troubled aircraft manufacturer. The union informed its 33,000 striking members early Saturday.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Extends Debt Deadlines, JetBlue Founder Suggests Frontier Group A More Suitable Match
data.description: Spirit Airlines extends its debt deadlines amid bankruptcy speculations, while JetBlue's founder argues that Frontier would have been a better match after their failed merger.

data.title: Washington To Obama: Rare Presidential Autograph Collection Could Fetch $500,000 At Auction
data.description: An auction is selling a lot of autographs from the first 43 presidents of the United States, an incredibly rare collection of American history.

data.title: Harris Clings To Narrow National Lead As Trump Gains Ground
data.description: Kamala Harris holds a slim lead over Donald Trump in a new 2024 election poll.
